name: Review Supervisor
approvalCriteria: All findings have exact file paths and line numbers
Findings verified via FTS5 search (no hallucinations)
Severity correctly assigned (critical vs warning vs info)
Remediation suggestions are actionable and specific
No false positives (findings exist in actual code)
Feedback is constructive and focuses on improvement
reviewPrompt: Review the code review findings. Verify each finding exists in actual code (use FTS5 search). Ensure recommendations are constructive and actionable. Reject findings that are vague, unhelpful, or hallucinated.
